title: Strategic Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Architecture for Cost-Effective Code Vulnerability Detection
summary: Automated code vulnerability detection is critical for software security, yet existing approaches face a fundamental trade-off between detection accuracy and computational cost. We propose a heterogeneous multi-agent architecture inspire...
